Petition #8 mostly lists the deceased executor's heirs and her trust beneficiaries. (2) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate [DE-120] to be given to all persons who are to be identified in Petition #8. Prob. Code sections 8100, 8100(a). LRSF 14.18.C.1).

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES E TUCKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as the following issues remain unaddressed since the initial hearing on 06/06/2023: 1) The deferred assessment fees must be paid. 2) If the petitioner intends to request her fees, the petition must be amended with supporting time records. The Court is to determine whether to deny a further continuance and take this petition under submission at this time, given that the petition has been pending for more than 7 months, and to order payment of fees and costs of the conservator's attorneys as prayed, order payment of the assessment fees in full, and allow the remaining cash of the estate to be applied toward the conservator's unspecified fees. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE PATRICK WILLIAMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: (1) Even though petition includes Summary of Account, this petition is treated as report of status of administration. (2) Need Schedule B of Receipt. ($363.72?) (3) Need Schedule C of disbursements. ($28,590.74?) (4) Proposed order must be submitted before hearing. LRSF 14.7.A. (5) Petitioner to clarify the nature of this petition. It appears no more than a report of the status of the administration seeking additional time to administer the estate. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TUAN VAN TRAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1)Issues raised in Examiner's Notes, which were sent on 4/27/23, have not been responded to. Note: a. The supplement filed on 9/13/23 has not been reviewed as it has not been properly verified. The verifications filed on 12/22/23 are procedurally defective, as they do not identify the filing date of the supplemental declaration as required by Local Rule 14.15C and noted in the Examiner's Notes sent on 4/27/23. b. The petition filed on 3/1/23 still has not been properly verified. 2) No accounting for funds received via small estate affidavit has been filed as stated would be at the hearing on 11/7/23. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WYN WANG LEUNG IRREVOCABLE TRUST DATED APRIL 20, TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petition includes not only the trust accounting, but also an accounting of non-trust assets such as the settlor's IRA and other retirement accounts and report of the petitioner's acts taken as attorney-in-fact and agent under the settlor's power of attorney. The petitioner has not opened a new case (PES) under the name of the power of attorney, nor has the petitioner filed a separate petition under Probate Code section 4541(b) to seek approval of her accounting with respect to the non-trust assets covered by the power of attorney, rather than the trust. 2) The accounting, as presented, is commingled. The non-trust assets and related transactions were not separately accounted for within the same petition. 3) The Court is to determine how best to proceed, in light of Gene Yue's objection on file. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIE ANDREWS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues need to be cleared: (1) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate [DE-121] was mailed; however, it failed to affirm #5 to mirror that the petition seeks IAEA authority. CRC 7.50. (2) Notice of Direction for Remote Appearances and Access to be served with the notice. LRSF 14.1.C.6). (3) Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative [DE-147] to be filed. (4) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E. (5) Petition #8 to identify each person's relationship to the decedent as the form instructs. (6) Petition #8 also needs to identify the trustee of the sole devisee trust. Depending on who the trustee is, trust beneficiaries need to be listed and noticed, if applicable. Prob. Code sec. 1208. (7) Petition #3.d to clarify the estimated value of the property, whether all $750K is for personal property only or real property only. (8) Petition #5.a. (3)-(4) to be clarified re: whether the decedent was or was not survived by a registered domestic partner. (9) Proposed Order has not been submitted. LRSF 14.7.A. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BYRON R. MEYER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues remain unaddressed for Sheldon Meyer's petition: 1) An amended DE-147 form must be filed to provide a missing telephone number and day of signing. 2) No DE-147S form is on file. This form must be filed confidentially and conventionally with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed or attached to any e-filed document). 3) The petitioner's name stated at items 2 and 3 of the DE-121 form must exactly match the name under which this petition was filed (no middle initial). 4) The petition caption: The first box must be checked, as the petitioner is named as executor in the will. 5) Item 2b(1) must be checked. 6) The proof of service attached to the DE-121 form does not show direct notice given to Barbara Meyer. CRC 7.51(a)(1) & (2). No waiver of direct notice signed by her or her attorney is on file. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
